description: List supported device type templates (covers `neomind device types list` — key for device onboarding, previously 0 coverage).

turns.user: What device types does the system currently support? What metrics and commands does each type expose?

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent runs `neomind device types list` (or GET /api/device-types) and attempts to summarize metrics/commands
expectations.overall: Answer must be grounded in tool results (empty list is valid; not OK to guess)
